<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TimeSeries; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; class TSMGET extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'TS.MGET'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { $processedArguments = []; $argumentsObject = array_shift($arguments); $commandArguments = $argumentsObject->toArray(); array_push($processedArguments, 'FILTER', ...$arguments); parent::setArguments(array_merge( $commandArguments, $processedArguments )); } }
